    acceptInvitation(String, NotificationItem) - Method in class com.example.eventparticipation.NotificationRepository
    Processes an entrant accepting an event invitation using a Firestore transaction.

    addNotSelectedNotificationToBatch(WriteBatch, FirebaseFirestore, String, String, String) - Static method in class com.example.eventparticipation.NotificationRepository
    Adds a "Not Selected" notification to an active Firestore WriteBatch.
    addSelectedNotificationToBatch(WriteBatch, FirebaseFirestore, String, String, String) - Static method in class com.example.eventparticipation.NotificationRepository
    Adds a "Selected" notification to an active Firestore WriteBatch.

    applyDeclined(NotificationItem) - Static method in class com.example.eventparticipation.NotificationActionHelper

    D

    declineInvitation(String, NotificationItem) - Method in class com.example.eventparticipation.NotificationRepository
    Processes an entrant declining an event invitation using a Firestore transaction.
    DeviceIdProvider - Class in com.example.eventparticipation
    Utility class for getting and validating the device ID used by the app.
    drawReplacement(String) - Method in class com.example.eventparticipation.WaitlistController
    Draws a single replacement applicant from the waiting pool if a spot opens up.

    E

    ensureAdminProfileExists(String, ProfileInitializer.Callback) - Method in class com.example.eventparticipation.ProfileInitializer
    Ensures that an admin profile exists in Firestore.
    ensureEntrantProfileExists(String, ProfileInitializer.Callback) - Method in class com.example.eventparticipation.ProfileInitializer
    Ensures that an entrant profile exists in Firestore.
    ensureOrganizerProfileExists(String, ProfileInitializer.Callback) - Method in class com.example.eventparticipation.ProfileInitializer
    Ensures that an organizer profile exists in Firestore.
    Entrant - Class in com.example.eventparticipation
    Model class representing a single entrant record stored in an event waitlist.
    Entrant() - Constructor for class com.example.eventparticipation.Entrant
    Required empty constructor for Firestore deserialization.
    Entrant(String, String, String, String, String, GeoPoint, Date) - Constructor for class com.example.eventparticipation.Entrant
    Creates a fully populated entrant object.
    EntrantAdapter - Class in com.example.eventparticipation
    RecyclerView adapter used to display entrants in the organizer waitlist screen.
    EntrantAdapter(List) - Constructor for class com.example.eventparticipation.EntrantAdapter
    Creates an adapter for the provided entrant list.
    EntrantDashboardActivity - Class in com.example.eventparticipation
    Entrant dashboard showing all available events ("Discover Events").
    EntrantDashboardActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventparticipation.EntrantDashboardActivity

    RecyclerView adapter for displaying events on the entrant dashboard.

    Returns the total number of rows displayed by the adapter.

    getJoinedAddress() - Method in class com.example.eventparticipation.Entrant
    Returns the join address recorded for the entrant.
    getJoinedAt() - Method in class com.example.eventparticipation.Entrant
    Returns the timestamp when the entrant joined the waitlist.
    getJoinedLocation() - Method in class com.example.eventparticipation.Entrant
    Returns the geographic location where the entrant joined.
    getMessage() - Method in class com.example.eventparticipation.NotificationItem
     
    getName() - Method in class com.example.eventparticipation.Event
    Retrieves the name or title of the event.

    Helper method to get a reference to an entrant's notifications subcollection.
    getOrganizerId() - Method in class com.example.eventparticipation.Event
    Retrieves the ID of the organizer who created the event.
    getPosterUrl() - Method in class com.example.eventparticipation.Event
    Retrieves the download URL for the event's promotional poster.
    getPrimaryActionLabel(NotificationItem) - Static method in class com.example.eventparticipation.NotificationActionHelper
     
    getRegistrationEnd() - Method in class com.example.eventparticipation.Event
    Retrieves the closing date and time for event registration.
    getRegistrationStart() - Method in class com.example.eventparticipation.Event
    Retrieves the opening date and time for event registration.
    getSelectedCount() - Method in class com.example.eventparticipation.Event
    Retrieves the number of entrants currently selected from the waitlist.
    getStartTime() - Method in class com.example.eventparticipation.Event
    Retrieves the scheduled start time of the event.
    getStatus() - Method in class com.example.eventparticipation.Entrant
    Returns the current waitlist status.
    getType() - Method in class com.example.eventparticipation.NotificationItem
     
    getVenueAddress() - Method in class com.example.eventparticipation.Event
    Retrieves the physical address or location name of the venue.

    Retrieves the venue latitude.
    getVenueLng() - Method in class com.example.eventparticipation.Event
    Retrieves the venue longitude.
    getWaitingCount() - Method in class com.example.eventparticipation.Event
    Retrieves the number of entrants currently waiting on the waitlist.
    getWaitlistLimit() - Method in class com.example.eventparticipation.Event
    Retrieves the optional limit on the number of entrants allowed on the waitlist.
